title: The Chocolate Mod
description: A lightweight fabric minecraft mod that adds chocolate in a vanilla-ish way!
body:
Welcome, everybody to: 

The Chocolate Mod!


About ℹ️:

This mod adds in a bunch of chocolate-related items (Duh) it adds all different kinds of chocolate bars, new blocks and much more! 

This Mod is also constantly being updated to the newest version of Minecraft so you don't have to worry about this mod becoming outdated!

That said I really hope you enjoy playing with this mod, I have worked hard and will continue to work hard and develop this mod to the fullest!

Enjoy the mod!


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


Q&A ❓️:

- Q: Can I use this mod in a modpack?

- A: Yes of course! I actually think this mod does better in a modpack that is centered around food, just make sure to credit me!

- Q: How far in between will updates be?

- A: Depends on how motivated I am feeling to code, sometimes maybe a few weeks. Other times maybe a month or two

- Q: Where can I report issues/bugs?

- A: Right here: https://github.com/ACgamerReal/Simple-Chocolate-Mod-Sources/issues

- Q: What about compatibility?

- A: I have tested a few mods toghether with this mod (Farmer's delight, Farmer's delight expanded), they all seem to work fine. If there is an incompatibility please report it to the issues github

- Q: Will this mod be updated to the newest versions of minecraft?

- A: Yes, I will try to update it as soon as I can
If you have any more questions feel free to leave a comment!


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
